aug  1 71  NYC, Concert for Bengladesh (afternoon)
Madison Square Garden:

audience tape
01. A Hard Rains A-Gonna Fall
02. Blowin In The Wind
03. It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry
04. Love Minus Zero / No Limit
05. Just Like A Woman 

WNEV-FM radio broadcast
06. interview with Phil Spector
07. Love Minus Zero/No Limit
08. A Hard Rains a-Gonna Fall
